description: Your Zotero library was accidentally synchronized from two different sources, creating duplicate entries for every paper. Notes were added to some copies but not others. Find all duplicate items and merge them, ensuring that reading notes from all copies are preserved in the merged result. After completing the merge, every paper should appear exactly once, and any paper that had a note on any copy must still have that note on the surviving entry.

papers_with_notes: Synaptic Plasticity and Memory: An Evaluation of the Hypothesis
The Role of Dopamine in Reward and Motivation
Grid Cells and the Entorhinal Map of Space
Hebbian Synapses: Biophysical Mechanisms and Algorithms
Default Mode Network Activity and Consciousness
Mirror Neurons and the Simulation Theory of Mind-Reading
Prefrontal Cortex and Executive Function: A Review
Cortical Oscillations and the Binding Problem
Basal Ganglia and the Control of Action Selection
